_comment: Ancient Thunder Realm (古雷界 / Gu Lei Jie) dimension type — a pocket dimension in Renegade Immortal canon that is the source of thunder-attribute spiritual energy. Wang Lin enters it to cultivate his thunder essence and Ji Realm (a thunder-based killing technique). Perpetually storm-wreathed: lightning strikes constantly, sky is roiling black-purple clouds, ground is scorched glass-like obsidian. Non-thunder cultivators are damaged by merely being here — spirit energy is purely thunder-aspected. Per canon: beds would ignite (bed_works=false), no natural light (perpetual storm), no raids, no piglin safety. monster_spawn_light_level allows spawns at any light level (0-15) because the storm obscures everything. Prime Directive: these properties are objective — the Ancient Thunder Realm exists as a thunder-saturated pocket dimension independent of perception.
